name: bakifitness
description: AI-powered fitness app with diet plans, workout videos, and progress tracking

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:mobile" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:mobile && npm run build:admin
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install

author: BakiFitness Team
